title: cyclosorus interruptus
intro: Cyclosorus interruptus, also known as the interrupted cyclosorus or Chinese tuckahoe, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of cyclosorus interruptus are believed to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome and roots are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
